planned_retrieval_metrics.Recall@3: 1 if any reviewed acceptable chunk is in ranks 1-3, else 0
planned_retrieval_metrics.Recall@5: 1 if any reviewed acceptable chunk is in ranks 1-5, else 0
planned_retrieval_metrics.MRR: mean reciprocal rank; per question score is 1 / first acceptable rank, or 0

review_requirements: Confirm every reference claim is directly supported by the paper.
Confirm every acceptable chunk directly supports its assigned claim.
Remove boilerplate, OCR errors, and claims that do not answer the question.
Set all three review flags before promoting the candidate set.
